nasb.text: David said to God, “I have sinned greatly, in that I have done this thing. But now, please take away the iniquity of Your servant, for I have done very foolishly.”

esv.text: And David said to God, “I have sinned greatly in that I have done this thing. But now, please take away the iniquity of your servant, for I have acted very foolishly.”

cnv.text: 大衛對　神說：“我犯了重罪，因為我行了這事；現在求你除去你僕人的罪孽，因我作了十分愚昧的事。”

ccb.text: 大卫对上帝说：“我做这事犯了大罪。求你赦免仆人的罪，我做了极其愚昧的事。”
